name: Possee Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can of Chile Beans (Ranch style or Bush's chile beans)
1 small can of diced green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Open all cans and transfer the contents, including the liquid, into a large pot.
2. Heat the mixture until warmed through.
3. Adjust spiciness by using different canned tomato varieties if desired.
4. Add diced onions and garlic for extra flavor.
5. Optionally, include ground beef to complete the recipe.
